image_prompt: Infographic alert layout. Bold warning headline top with caution triangle icon: 'LOW GSA PRICE = LOSING STRATEGY.' Two-column layout below. Left column dark navy background: bold label 'THE MISTAKE' in red, illustrated professional man looking worried at a downward price chart, two 2-word labels: 'Race Down', 'Locked In'. Right column white background: bold label 'THE FIX' in green, illustrated professional woman confidently holding contract, two 2-word labels: 'Protect Margin', 'Negotiate Up'. Bottom dark navy callout banner: 'PRICE RIGHT ONCE'. Footer text: 'Josh Ladick · GSA Focus'.
